gauge.name: Bill Williams River at Alamo Lake

impacts.statement: Water reaches the embankment crest elevation at the top of the dam. The dam crest length is 283 feet.
Water reaches the spillway crest elevation. Crest length is 284 feet.

dataAttribution.title: Observations courtesy of U.S. Geological Survey
Observations courtesy of U.S. Army Corps of Engineers

gauge.forecastReliability: Forecasts are not available. Only observed stages are available for this point.
